headline: Clean Harbors Q1 Earnings Beat on SKSS Gains, Revenues Fall Short
summary: CLH tops Q1'26 EPS estimates, and raises full-year EBITDA and free cash flow targets as Environmental Services benefits from PFAS and projects.

headline: IQVIA Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: IQVIA (NYSE:IQV) reported record first-quarter revenue and adjusted diluted earnings per share for 2026, with management citing accelerating organic growth across its Commercial Solutions and R&D Solutions businesses, increased demand tied to artificial intelligence offerings and continued strength
